quick_skim.title: Efficient Bayesian Deep Ensembles via Analytic Predictive Inference
quick_skim.abstract: We introduce an efficient Bayesian deep ensemble method for predictive regression designed to enhance interpretability while maintaining competitive predictive performance and computational efficiency. Our method combines the statistical rigor of Bayesian inference with the scalability of deep ensembles, providing calibrated uncertainty estimates that enable its use not only for standalone prediction but also as a component within broader learning systems. To achieve these goals, our work relies on three key design components: (i) low-dimensional ensemble representation: predictions are expressed as a combination of a small number of trained neural predictors, enabling scalable inference whose cost depends on ensemble size rather than dataset size; (ii) closed-form Bayesian aggregation: ensemble predictions are combined using Bayesian linear regression, yielding interpretable posterior weights and calibrated uncertainty without approximate inference; and (iii) Independent ensemble training: multiple neural networks are trained separately, producing diverse predictive representations that improve robustness and uncertainty calibration. Empirical results on standard regression benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves competitive predictive performance while maintaining reliable uncertainty estimates across settings.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Bayesian deep ensembles for predictive regression with calibrated uncertainty, useful for air quality forecasting and bias correction
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 贝叶斯深度集成方法用于带校准不确定性的预测回归，可用于空气质量预报和偏差校正
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 贝叶斯深度集成方法用于带校准不确定性的预测回归，可用于空气质量预报和偏差校正
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 贝叶斯深度集成方法用于带校准不确定性的预测回归，可用于空气质量预报和偏差校正
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces an efficient Bayesian deep ensemble method for regression that provides calibrated uncertainty estimates with computational efficiency, suitable for integration into larger learning systems.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对深度学习中的不确定性量化问题，提出一种高效的贝叶斯深度集成方法。该方法通过低维集成表示和解析预测推理，在保持深度可扩展性的同时提供校准的不确定性估计。其三个关键设计组件包括：基于少量训练神经网络的低维表示、解析预测分布计算和高斯混合后验近似。该方法适用于独立预测和作为更大学件系统的组件，可应用于空气质量预报中的偏差校正和数据同化。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对深度学习中的不确定性量化问题，提出一种高效的贝叶斯深度集成方法。该方法通过低维集成表示和解析预测推理，在保持深度可扩展性的同时提供校准的不确定性估计。其三个关键设计组件包括：基于少量训练神经网络的低维表示、解析预测分布计算和高斯混合后验近似。该方法适用于独立预测和作为更大学件系统的组件，可应用于空气质量预报中的偏差校正和数据同化。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for PM2.5 ozone air quality forecasting bias correction and data assimilation
